content:
1. SQL search for users by name/email substring (w/ optional role filter); returns User rows. Quick port of admin search from old codebase.
2. SQL injection (raw f-string interpolation); unclear auth; no upstream sanitization guarantee; resource leaks on errors.
3. Query sanitization upstream; auth boundary.
4. SQL injection; DB errors; huge `limit`; missing parameterization; no input validation.
